# chalk_private_gateway_binding (Resource)

Manages a binding between a Chalk cluster and a private gateway.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the cluster to bind to the private gateway.
- `private_gateway_id` (String) The ID of the private gateway to bind to the cluster.
